# Tantalus Geomatics Land Surveying Ltd.

> Professional Land Surveying and Geomatics engineering services throughout British Columbia, specializing in the Sea to Sky corridor, Squamish, North Vancouver, and Bowen Island.

This file provides an AI-friendly guide to the structural layout, services, and core resources of Tantalus Geomatics Land Surveying Ltd. Governed by the Association of BC Land Surveyors (Corporate Permit #1046), operations are led by Dennis, a dual-registered professional BCLS (#1104) and Professional Engineer (EGBC #57741).

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/) - Main landing page outlining professional qualifications, legal boundary authority, and introductory service frameworks.
- [About](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/about/) - Company background, credentialing details, and professional liability insurance oversight.
- [Services](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/services/) - Master list of surveying services including Residential, Construction, Legal, Commercial, Engineering, and Strata workflows.
- [FAQ](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/faq/) - Frequently asked questions on zoning laws, property markers, encroachments, and municipal approvals.
- [Contact](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/contact/) - Inquiry pathways to request project estimates, submit site coordinates, or upload career resumes.

## Regional Surveying Services

### The Sea to Sky Corridor
- [Topographic Surveys & Site Plans](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/the-sea-to-sky/services/topographic-surveys-and-site-plans/) - Mapping of ground elevations, contours, structural landmarks, and utility networks to anchor architectural blueprints.

### City of North Vancouver
- [Statutory Rights Of Way Surveys](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/city-north-vancouver/services/statutory-rights-of-way-surveys/) - Meticulous Land Title and Survey Authority (LTSA) compliant research, monumentation, and plan preparation for legal utility/easement corridors.

### District of North Vancouver
- [Boundary Surveys](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/district-north-vancouver/services/boundary-surveys/) - Cadastral research, field recovery of original markers, iron post monumentation, and official Posting Plan filing to formally protect property borders.

### Squamish
- [Proposed Strata Plans](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/squamish/services/proposed-strata-plans/) - Letter-sized legal layout plans and Form V unit entitlement calculations optimized for disclosure statements in multi-unit developments.
- [Strata Plan Amendment Surveys](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/squamish/services/strata-plan-amendment-surveys/) - Terrestrial LiDAR and Robotic Total Station 3D data capture to formulate legal amending sheets under Part 15 of the Strata Property Act.

### Bowen Island
- [Volume And Earthwork Surveys](https://www.tantalusgeomatics.com/bowen-island/services/volume-and-earthwork-surveys/) - Drone orthoimagery and 3D TIN surfaces generated for precision cut-and-fill volumetric reports to verify contractor invoicing.
